{"id":"smallhold-dee","title":"POST /oauth/token: exchange auth code for bearer token","description":"Implement token endpoint. grant_type=authorization_code: look up code (hashed), verify not expired, verify redirect_uri matches, create bearer token (64 bytes base64url stored as SHA-256 hex), delete the used authorization code. grant_type=client_credentials: for app-only tokens (scopes limited to read). Return token response matching Mastodon's shape.

**Agent workflow**: Spawn a research subagent to document the exact token response shape from mastodon.social as the oracle.

**Test discipline**:
- Code exchange with valid code: bearer token returned
- Code exchange with expired code: 400 invalid_grant
- Code exchange used twice: second attempt 400 (code deleted after first use)
- Verify token stored as SHA-256(token), not plaintext
- Response shape validated against mastodon.social oracle
Tests verify DB state directly (SHA-256 hash in table, code row deleted) — independent oracle.

**Defensive programming**:
- Delete authorization code atomically with token creation (in a transaction)
- Bearer token generated with OsRng
- Never log the token — log only the hashed token identifier
- No .unwrap() outside test code; all errors Result<T, AppError>","acceptance_criteria":"Valid code exchange returns token; code unusable after first use (returns 400); expired code rejected; token stored as SHA-256 hash; code deleted atomically with token creation; response matches mastodon.social shape","status":"open","priority":1,"issue_type":"feature","owner":"mark@wolfssl.com","created_at":"2026-04-23T00:30:43Z","created_by":"Mark Atwood","updated_at":"2026-04-23T00:30:43Z","metadata":{},"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"","depends_on_id":"smallhold-sbt","type":"relates-to","created_at":"2026-04-22T17:31:11Z","created_by":"Mark Atwood","metadata":"{}"}]}
